import urllib.request, json
data = json.dumps\({'model':'qwen3:8b','messages':[{'role':'user','content':'hi'}],'stream':False}\).encode\(\)

r = urllib.request.urlopen\(req, timeout=120\)
print\('Status:', r.status\)
print\('Body:', r.read\(\).decode\(\)[:200]\)
" 2>&1)
